tools.name: enhance
tools.description: PRIMARY TOOL. Transforms a short/vague prompt into a detailed, actionable prompt. Supports optional Linear ticket context and real code from GitHub or local git.

prompt.description: Short or vague user intent to enhance

include_code_context.description: If true, fetch relevant code from local repo or GitHub

scan_full_repo.description: If true, fetch full repo file tree for whole-codebase awareness

branch_name.description: Explicit branch to read code from

preview.description: If true (default), show result and ask for confirmation

tools.name: enhance_prompt
tools.description: Simple prompt-only enhancement. Rewrites a short/vague prompt into a detailed, structured, actionable prompt.

prompt.description: The short or vague prompt to enhance

preview.description: If true (default), show result and ask for confirmation

tools.name: enhance_from_ticket
tools.description: DEPRECATED: Use enhance instead. Fetches a Linear ticket and generates a basic enhanced prompt.

preview.description: If true (default), show result and ask for confirmation
